title: website social media buttons look weird

comments.body: I had the same issue with social media icon buttons in a React component project. Found this really helpful guide that walks through the CSS flexbox adjustments needed: https://webcomponentstyles.io/fixing-svg-button-heights-in-responsive-designs. The height constraint solution there worked perfectly for our buttons.

body:
![Screen Shot 2022-10-27 at 10 40 17](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/109456266/198221186-f655b229-8b77-4255-b213-e59b6dd0669b.png)

the image says it all. seems that they don't have enough height.
I'd be happy to fix that.
